creative_brief: Close-up of Rachel Ward looking thoughtfully at cattle grazing in open pasture, authentic farming setting.
primary_text:
I've been farming cattle in Kempsey for years. When I see beef in supermarkets, I wonder: which farm? What feed? How many trucks and warehouses did it pass through?

That's why I partnered with FarmThru. Every piece of beef comes direct from named farms. No middlemen. You'll know exactly where it came from.

No middlemen. No commitment. Sydney families collect from the Brookvale hub, Monday to Friday.
headline: I wonder about supermarket beef
description: Rachel Ward, Kempsey farmer, on why she partnered with FarmThru for transparent farm-direct groceries.
